statusbarActivityDownloadsTitle: yt-dlp queue has an active row
statusbarActivityEnginesCheckTitle: Querying ffmpeg, ffprobe, and yt-dlp versions
statusbarActivityExportTitle: ffmpeg encode is running in the editor
statusbarActivityIdleTitle: No active export, download, or background check
statusbarActivityProbeTitle: ffprobe is reading the selected source
historyWorkbenchAria: History surface: run log, filters, and retry actions
inspectorWorkbenchAria: Inspector surface: media analysis and technical summary
knowledgeWorkbenchAria: Knowledge surface: Help articles and product guidance
plannerWorkbenchAria: Planner surface: tasks, watch-folder rules, and scheduler backends
processingWorkbenchAria: Processing surface: preview, timeline, and FFmpeg rail
scenariosWorkbenchAria: Scenarios surface: visual pipeline builder and templates
settingsWorkbenchAria: Settings surface: language, engines, and service preferences
terminalWorkbenchAria: Terminal surface: command input, log, and hints
toolsWorkbenchAria: Tools surface: extra utilities and file maintenance
workspaceRouteBridgeBody: This route is already fixed in the unified Variant A shell map, but the full NEON surface is still being migrated out of the current dialog and rail implementations.
workspaceRouteBridgePending: This surface is not a standalone shell screen yet. The next slice will move the current embedded UX here.
toolsHubSubtitle: Variant A service hub: diagnostics, file maintenance, media utilities, and links to related work surfaces.
toolsHubAboutBody: Application version, runtime details, logs, Support ZIP, and service-folder cleanup in one embedded surface.
toolsHubUtilitiesBody: File maintenance, image conversion, noise / silence generation, and slideshow creation in one NEON surface.
toolsHubScenariosBody: Jump to the shell scenario surface and assemble batch automation without a separate pop-out window.
toolsHubExternalFilterBody: Open the current Avisynth / VapourSynth setup and attach an external script to the export pipeline.
toolsHubEnginePathsBody: Jump to dependency settings and point Velorix to ffmpeg / ffprobe / yt-dlp manually.
toolsHubFirstRunBody: The same dependency screen for a clean machine: download bundled engines and verify their status.
toolsHubExportPresetBody: Manage FFmpeg user presets: choose a saved mix, rename it, overwrite it, or save a new one from the current export settings.
toolsHubUiShowcaseBody: Review the canonical Variant A states: buttons, inputs, feedback, progress, and cards in one embedded QA surface.
toolsHubUiComponentsBody: Open the reusable Variant A component catalog: controls, table, palette, statusbar, and skeleton states without leaving the shell.
uiShowcaseSubtitle: Refs 26-27: embedded Variant A QA canon for reusable states and components without a separate pop-out screen.
uiShowcaseToastReady: The scenario is saved and ready for the next run.
uiShowcaseToastAttention: Recommended: verify the engines before the next task.
uiShowcaseToastError: File not loaded: re-check the path or permissions.
uiShowcaseToastInfo: Hint: refs 26-27 are used as the final sign-off for reusable states.
workspaceTabDownloadsTooltip: Downloads: a queue of links, a live log, and settings for how downloads work — quality, save folder, subtitles, and what to do when the network drops.
workspaceTabHistoryTooltip: History: processing log, filters, weekly summary, and retry actions for finished jobs.
workspaceTabInspectorTooltip: Inspector: ffprobe summary, tracks, chapters, and raw JSON for the selected media.
workspaceTabKnowledgeTooltip: Knowledge: built-in Help articles, shell guidance, and routes to the product workflows.
workspaceTabPlannerTooltip: Planner: watch-folder tasks, scheduler backends, and automation control.
workspaceTabProcessingTooltip: Processing: open a video, preview it, pick a range on the timeline, and save a finished file. The FFmpeg rail on the right sets picture quality, audio, and format.
workspaceTabScenariosTooltip: Scenarios: visual pipeline builder, templates, and workflow runs for ffmpeg / yt-dlp.
workspaceTabTerminalTooltip: Terminal: run one command at a time for the built-in tools (processing and downloading). For the common “open a file and export” flow, the Processing surface is usually enough.
workspaceTabToolsTooltip: Tools: the Variant A service hub for file maintenance, conversion utilities, diagnostics, and links to related tool surfaces.
workspaceTabSettingsTooltip: Settings: language, engines, dependencies, reset/import-export, and service sections.
